# 🌟 FullBright 2.0 — The Ultimate Visibility Update 🌟

## It’s here — FullBright 2.0, the biggest and brightest update yet! 💥

### After just one intense day of development, this version brings complete compatibility for Minecraft 1.18.2 → 26.1 (actually 2.3v made it work on 26.1), making it the most powerful and flexible release so far. Whether you’re mining, building, or just exploring, the darkness is no match for you anymore. 💡

### ✨ What’s new in v2.0:

### 🔹 Version support: Fully compatible from 1.18.2 to 1.21.10

### ⚙️ Improved performance: Smoother visuals, faster loading

### 🌃 Balanced lighting: Full brightness without ruining the natural colors

### 💾 Lightweight & lag-free: No shaders or mods needed — plug and play

### 🧱 Perfect for any playstyle: Creative building, survival exploring, or redstone tinkering

### Built in a single day — powered by hype, passion, and brightness! ⚡

### 💬 Try it now, share it with your friends, and keep the light shining bright!
